human-review.evidence: human approved at human-review checkpoint; approve + commit checkpoint

escalations.reason: Two HIGH a11y contract violations against the spec's accessibility MUSTs: UX-001 (REQ-010) the compass has no VISIBLE highlight for the focused/default/hovered direction because the focus-ring/hover CSS allow-list in index.css excludes the portalled split-menu; UX-002 (REQ-011) the kind selector declares an ARIA radiogroup but the container onKeyDown hijacks arrow keys so radio selection is non-functional and the radios are 3 tab stops not one roving stop. Decision: fix (loop back to implement) vs waive/relax the accessibility requirement.
escalations.decision: Fix. Loop back to implement: make the compass focus/default/hover highlight visible (add split-menu to the index.css focus-visible/hover allow-list, paint-only) to satisfy REQ-010.

escalations.reason: See ESC for FINDING-UX-001 — both HIGH a11y contract violations decided together.
escalations.decision: Fix. Loop back to implement: fix the kind selector keyboard/ARIA contract for REQ-011 (working roving selection or aria-pressed toggle-buttons; one tab stop) without editing frozen tests.

loopbacks.reason: REQ-014 reconciliation incomplete: 7 pre-existing e2e specs (smoke, ui-polish, broadcast, notepad, persistence, run-commands, workspace-templates) still spawn a 2nd terminal via removed split-terminal-/split-col- testids; frozen-suite contradiction TEST-006 (split-col- count 0) vs smoke.spec.ts clicking split-col-. phase_of_origin=tests.

Human decision (ESC-001/ESC-002 resolved=fix): fix 2 HIGH a11y contract violations UX-001 (no visible compass highlight, REQ-010) + UX-002 (broken radiogroup keyboard/ARIA, REQ-011), plus fold in DEV-002 (popover vertical clamp/flip) and DEV-004 (focus trap + return-focus). No test edits (frozen).
